assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all notification types: end-of-life warnings, upgrade available events, upgrade started (auto-upgrade), and security patches (COS milestone patches)

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: The urgency hierarchy is incorrect - response assigns CRITICAL to end-of-life warnings and LOW to patches, but security patches should be highest priority, not lowest

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response clearly states EoS notifications require immediate action within 1-2 weeks and explains GKE will force-upgrade at end of support

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed action checklists for auto-upgrade events including monitoring progress and running post-upgrade validation

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response treats patches as LOW priority for 'next maintenance window' but doesn't address that security patches may require expedited action outside normal windows

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes 'upgrade available' as HIGH priority for planning (1-4 weeks timeline) but emphasizes planning and testing rather than immediate action

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud commands for configuring Pub/Sub notifications and Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE cluster events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions reviewing 'GKE release notes for breaking changes' as part of the upgrade planning process
